content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory can be augmented by framing curiosity-driven exploration intrinsic reward signals (from ICM and RND methods) as a dynamic memory pruning and prioritization gate: only novel, surprising experience chunks that trigger high intrinsic reward are encoded into long-term episodic memory for downstream planning, while redundant expected observations are discarded. This creates a self-organizing memory that grows only with high-value data aligned to the agent’s active learning goals.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
